verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This highway of heartcahe is rocky and rough Lord, I learned a long time ago You can't build a fire from the ashes of love Roses don't bloom in the snow

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Down deep inside my soul Where once it was cold and dark I feel Your love take ahold Way down deep in my heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You were my light on the darkest of days Though storms that were raging within And slowly but surely the clouds rolled away And the sun started shining again
